Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1093}...So, starting today, he's an official member of the team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Welcome aboard, {f 4 1}-kun. I'm Yuko Nishiwaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1093}She's our team manager. She'll answer any of your questions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You're a second-year, right? Since we're in the same grade, you can just call me "Yuko."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1093}This here's our future team captain. He's a great runner and places well in competitions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1093}You two are in the same class, right? Miyamoto, keep an eye on the new guy here, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You're the guy who went out with Takeba on the first day of school, right? You're practically a celebrity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'm Kazushi Miyamoto. You've seen me around, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Then long story short, from now on, you're mine after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Ouch, man... Kinda hurts my pride. Everyone knows who I am.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You better not think you're getting the easy treatment just 'cause you joined mid-season![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto's given me a warm welcome...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I joined the track team and made[n]friends with my new teammates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Since this is your first practice, just have a look around and then call it a day.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}We have practice on {f 0 1 2}Mondays, Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Fridays{f 0 1 27}. There's no practice the days before tests, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'll make sure your uniform is ready for next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After looking around, I decided[n]to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
